title: poa maritima var. distans
intro: Poa maritima var. distans, also known as the beach bluegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is known to have various medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa maritima var. distans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
